note: Replacing interval polling with filesystem-backed change detection for tracked project files.
Server watches tracked project backlog, docs, and log directories on Windows and emits refresh signals on relevant file changes. No longer depends on fixed 60-second polling interval.

summary: ALV-005 implementation and repeatable validation are complete. The item remains blocked only on BOSS signoff for the watcher-backed refresh behavior.
next_gap: Obtain BOSS signoff on the validated filesystem watcher behavior.

summary: BOSS signoff received. ALV-005 is closed.
